zh.lifeSummary: 當John de la Mere於1296年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特努尼時，他的父親Thomas de la Mare17歲，母親Margaret Gamage12歲。他於大約1322年與Mrs. Joan Delamare結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年在英國賀福爾斯特特福德享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de la Mere于1296年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特努尼时，他的父亲Thomas de la Mare17岁，母亲Margaret Gamage12岁。他于大约1322年与Mrs. Joan Delamare结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年在英国賀福爾斯特特福德享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Mere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de la Mere was born in 1296, in Nunney, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de la Mare, was 17 and his mother, Margaret Gamage, was 12. He married Mrs. Joan Delamare about 1322. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1388, in Stretford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de la Mere est né en 1296, à Nunney, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de la Mare, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Margaret Gamage, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Joan Delamare environ 1322. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1388, à Stretford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de la Mere 1296 in Nunney, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de la Mare 17 und seine Mutter Margaret Gamage 12. Er hat um 1322 Mrs. Joan Delamare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1388 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Stretford, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de la Mere è nato il nel 1296 nel Nunney, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas de la Mare, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Gamage, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Joan Delamare circa 1322. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1388, nel Stretford, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de la Mereが1296年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトヌニーで生まれた時，父Thomas de la Mareは17歳，母Margaret Gamageは12歳であった。約1322年にMrs. Joan Delamareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアストレトフォードで92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de la Mere(이)가 1296년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 누니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de la Mare(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Gamage(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1322년 Mrs. Joan Delamare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 영국 허퍼드실르 스트레트퍼드에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de la Mere nasceu em 1296, em Nunney, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de la Mare, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Gamage, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Joan Delamare aproximadamente 1322. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1388, em Stretford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de la Mere родился в 1296 г. в местности нунни, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de la Mare было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gamage, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Joan Delamare около 1322 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1388 г. в местности стретфорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 92 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de la Mere nació en 1296, en Nunney, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de la Mare, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Margaret Gamage, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Mrs. Joan Delamare aproximadamente 1322. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1388, en Stretford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 92 años.
